themes.reasoning_notes: Instant-speed team pump plus untap can swing combat or ambush attackers; this is chiefly a defensive/offensive combat blowout.
Basic landcycling lets it convert into a needed basic land, giving flexible color/land smoothing when combat mode is not needed.
